res_mix <- df %>%
  filter(anio == "Año 3") %>%
  summarise(
    ingresos_total =
      sum(valor[item == "VENTAS TOTALES" & project == "FastPGT"], na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(valor[item %in% c("VENTA","VENTA TOTALES") & project == "rWGS"], na.rm = TRUE),
    egresos_total  =
      sum(valor[item == "EGRESOS" & project == "FastPGT"], na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(valor[item == "EGRESOS" & project == "rWGS"], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(anio = "Año 3", escenario = "PGT + rWGS")
